author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Marriagetoxin' Gets Second Season in Winter 2027
The 13th and final episode of Marriagetoxin ended with an announcement on Tuesday that a second season is in production. The official website also revealed an announcement promo. The second season is scheduled to premiere on Kansai TV and Fuji TV's new Karnival!! programming slot at 11:00 p.m. in January 2027. Produced by Bones Film, the first season adapting Joumyaku and Mizuki Yoda's action manga debuted on April 7. Crunchyroll streamed the series with multiple subtitles and dubs. J...

text:
'Blade & Bastard' Reveals Main Staff, Second Teaser Promo
The official X for the Blade & Bastard anime revealed the main staff and a second teaser promotional video on Tuesday. The anime is scheduled to premiere in 2027. Staff Director: Tomoki Kobayashi (Akame ga Kill!) Series Composition: Naruhisa Arakawa (Sousei no Onmyouji) Character Design: Rina Iwamoto (Kubikiri Cycle: Aoiro Savant to Zaregotozukai chief animation director) Sound Director: Kisuke Koizumi (Tongari Boushi no Atelier) Music: Hayato Matsuo (Drifters) Studio: Xingfu The anime adapt...

Summer 2026 Simulcast List
In this thread, you'll find a comprehensive list of television anime acquired for simulcast release during the Summer 2026 season. Anime series licensed for home video release can be found here. This post will be continuously updated as more simulcasts are announced. Feel free to post in this thread if you find a series that we are missing. text:
Q3 2026 Anime & Manga Licenses
In this thread, you'll find a comprehensive list of anime and manga licensed in the third quarter (Jul-Sep) of 2026. Summer 2026 anime which were licensed before the quarter began will also be carried over for convenience. Please note that the anime licenses are for home video release; simulcast acquisitions for Summer 2026 can be found here. Digital releases are noted with an asterisk (*). author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Manga 'Sensou Kyoushitsu' Gets TV Anime Adaptation for 2027
Production company CyberAgent opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Mozuku Sora and Higoro Toumori's Sensou Kyoushitsu (The Bugle Call: Song of War) on Tuesday and revealed the main staff, a teaser visual (pictured), and a teaser promotional video. The anime is scheduled to premiere in 2027. Staff Director: Shinya Watada (Rock wa Lady no Tashinami deshite) Series Composition: Michihiro Tsuchiya (Akane-banashi) Character Design: Michinori Chiba (SK∞) Action An...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2' Unveils Additional Staff, Second Teaser Promo [Update 6/30]
Netflix Japan revealed additional staff members and a second teaser promotional video for the Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 anime on Tuesday. The 10-episode anime series is scheduled to premiere worldwide on Netflix in Fall 2026. Staff Assistant Director: Naoto Uchida (Mob Psycho 100 III episode director) Chief Animation Director: Ichigo Kanno (Dungeon Meshi animation director) Music: Tsuneo Imahori (Trigun, Hajime no Ippo) Kai Ikarashi (Tengoku Daimakyou episode director) is directing the anime at T...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Katainaka no Ossan, Kensei ni Naru II' Announces Additional Cast
The official website of the Katainaka no Ossan, Kensei ni Naru (From Old Country Bumpkin to Master Swordsman) anime series revealed additional cast and an action promotional video for the second season on Monday. The new season adapting Shigeru Sagazaki's fantasy adventure novel is scheduled to premiere on July 8 at 11.45 p.m. on TV Asahi, followed by AT-X and BS Asahi.
